name: status
description: Colored dot with a label communicating the state of a system or entity

meta.name: Status
meta.description: Colored dot with a label communicating the state of a system or entity

props.name: pulse
props.description: Pulses the dot — gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference

whenToUse: Communicating the live state of a system or entity (operational, deploying, down)
Pairing a colored dot with a text label for an at-a-glance state
Drawing attention to an active/changing state with an optional pulse
whenNotToUse: A static category or count label — use Badge
An identity thumbnail with presence — use Avatar with its status prop

antiPatterns.why: A bare colored dot conveys nothing to color-blind or screen-reader users; always pair with text

related.name: Badge
related.reason: Badge labels categories; Status reflects live state with a dot

related.name: Avatar
related.reason: Avatar embeds presence status on an identity

intent.a11yRationale: Meaning is carried by the text label, never by the dot color alone; the pulse animation is gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference so it never animates for users who opt out

content.notes: Label the state, not the color

flexibility.note: Enable pulse only for actively-changing states
